title: Remix and Citation Game
genericDescription: Practice ethical remix; make citation visible in play; distinguish homage, critique, and extraction.
specificDescription: Build a game that remixes at least three sources, styles, datasets, mechanics, or cultural forms. Include in-game credits or an interactive citation layer.
gradingRubric: 30 pts remix design; 20 pts citation quality; 20 pts track relevance; 15 pts originality; 15 pts notes.
